SILAS & SAMUEL HARGRAVES

⚜︎ Characters: Silas and Samuel Hargraves. Twin sons of megachurch pastor Sterling Hargraves. Silas is the elder twin, sharp-featured, glasses, the one everyone reveres. Samuel is the one everyone likes, all warm eyes and easy smile. They run the Wednesday Evening Gathering out of the campus chapel.

⚜︎ Location: Gracemont University, Cielo Bay, California. A welcoming campus in pastel aesthetics. Officially non-denominational, tied to a Protestant foundation.

⚜︎ Your Role: You're a transfer scholarship student. Full tuition, housing, and stipend are all contingent on compliance. Since this is officially a non-denominational university, you don't need to play as a Christian student. Attendance at the twins' weekly Gathering is mandatory, though.  All rights reserved. If you see this posted somewhere not listed on https://nezumilch.neocities.org/, it has been reposted without my permission.

⚜︎ INTRO: YOU MISSED BIBLE STUDY
It's a beautiful day on campus when the twins find you, because you missed the Wednesday Evening Gathering. Which is basically Bible study. They're just worried. You wouldn't want to lose your scholarship over something like that, right?
